Sit! Sit! Sit!

Dark Phonics · Week 5 (i) · decodable reader · hidden potato cameo finale
Page 1

Sit! Sit!

Sam commands; the cat sasses back
Page 2

It is a pit!

The cat sat — straight into a pit
Page 3

Sit!

Sam insists; the muddy cat is pleased with itself
Page 4

It is sap!

The cat sat in the sap (week 4 callback)
Page 5

Sit! Sit!

Sam points at the mat; the cat sits anywhere else
Page 6

Sip, sip, sip.

Insolent teacup break
Page 7

Spit it!

The spray — and the wobble begins
Page 8

It sits! It is!

Gravity wins: the cat lands ON the mat. Cast applauds
Page 9

(wordless — find the potato!)

Cat lifts up — Teacher Potato squashed beneath
